stops.source: OpenStreetMap/Overpass dense in-gap corridor amenity query, accessed 2026-07-19; added to close a stretch with no truck-accessible service after the truck-accessibility sweep. Curated into a gameplay POI (clean name, normalized category) without raw OSM IDs.

stops.name: Love's Travel Stop Staunton
stops.source: Love's official store feed lists store 706 in Staunton, VA on I-64, exit 213; at_mi estimated by projecting source coordinates onto checked-in route geometry (4.6 mi from simplified corridor line), accessed 2026-06-17: https://www.loves.com/api/fetch_stores

stops.name: Charlottesville Safety Rest Area West
stops.source: OpenStreetMap/Overpass dense in-gap corridor amenity query, accessed 2026-07-19; added to close a stretch with no truck-accessible service after the truck-accessibility sweep. Curated into a gameplay POI (clean name, normalized category) without raw OSM IDs. Truck parking confirmed by the FHWA Jason's Law inventory (USDOT BTS NTAD Truck Stop Parking, compiled 2019), which lists Charlottesville Safety Rest Area West with 14 truck parking spaces on this corridor, accessed 2026-07-17: https://geodata.bts.gov/datasets/usdot::truck-stop-parking/about
